title: acmella kalelii
intro: Acmella kalelii, also known as the 'buzz button plant' or 'parrot's beak,' is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. Acmella kalelii is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat conditions like toothache and gum inflammation. The plant is commonly prepared as a topical cream or infused oil, which is applied directly to the affected area for its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
